meta.honesty_note: All families are public-safe and benchmark-ready. No teacher-only holdout families exist in this pack because the FPE curriculum has no disclosed holdout framing to block. Benchmark readiness means the task packets, rubrics, and provenance are complete — it does NOT mean every phase's runtime systems are live. See per-family readiness fields for the honest split.

policy.public_pack_rule: Only benchmark_ready + student_visible families may appear in fpe-public-benchmark-pack-v1.
policy.blocked_rule: No families are currently blocked. If teacher-only holdout families are authored in the future, they must be stored outside this pack.
policy.certification_note: This pack is suitable for public training, regression checks, and alpha-loop consumption. It is not a sealed certification exam.
policy.promotion_policy: Every candidate family must have explicit promotion_criteria. A family with zero criteria is not promotable.

families.title: Freeze the game being played
families.benchmark_goal: Evaluate agent ability to execute Phase 1 (Freeze the game being played) tasks from the frozen 20-task FPE curriculum.
public_checks: Task A001 success criteria are met
Task A002 success criteria are met
Task A003 success criteria are met
Task A004 success criteria are met

readiness.evidence: Contract surface fully implemented: role manifest, evaluation contract, task-packet schema, and seed registry are all checked in and versioned.

families.notes: Public-safe: all 4 tasks derive from Spec 014 public acceptance tests only.
